artifact: Counts drawn matches by league in the 2015/2016 season and returns the highest count.
sql: SELECT l.name FROM league AS l JOIN "Match" AS m ON m.league_id = l.id WHERE m.season = '2015/2016' AND m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal GROUP BY l.id, l.name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

raw_response.sql: SELECT l.name FROM league AS l JOIN "Match" AS m ON m.league_id = l.id WHERE m.season = '2015/2016' AND m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal GROUP BY l.id, l.name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
raw_response.artifact: Counts drawn matches by league in the 2015/2016 season and returns the highest count.
